overall.description: A cinematic third-person view inside The Three Broomsticks tavern from a Harry Potter video game (likely Hogwarts Legacy). The player character stands in the warm, fire-lit medieval interior with heavy wooden beams and balconies while an NPC sits at a table near the stone fireplace.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy medieval tavern interior with upper balcony and central fireplace

events.description: player character raises right hand to head in a thinking or observing gesture, then lowers it

agents.ego_description: standing still facing the tavern interior, occasionally shifting weight and briefly touching head

notable_agents.action: sitting at a wooden table near the fireplace, appearing to drink or rest

entered.detail: second-floor wooden railing with vertical posts spanning the upper level
carved wooden tavern sign mounted above the arched doorway
large stone fireplace with warm fire visible through the central archway
rustic wooden dining tables and bench seating along the right wall
circular iron chandelier with candle-style lights hanging from ceiling
warm glowing wall-mounted lanterns on wooden support beams

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady third-person view behind the player character inside The Three Broomsticks tavern. The warm, fire-lit interior features heavy wooden architecture with an upper balcony, rustic furniture, and an NPC sitting peacefully at a table near the stone fireplace. The character stands observing the scene before briefly raising a hand to their head in a thinking gesture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric perspective within the warm, fire-lit interior of The Three Broomsticks tavern. It begins with a third-person view from behind the player character, capturing the rustic charm of heavy wooden beams and an upper balcony. As the camera holds its position, the focus settles on the cozy environment where an NPC sits peacefully at a table beside a glowing stone fireplace. The scene concludes as the character remains observant of the medieval surroundings before briefly raising a hand to their head in a thinking gesture.
